headline: Agentic coding frameworks built on Claude Code led the quarter while a fast-inference stack of speculative decoding and persistent GPU kernels broke out.
body: Agent techniques dominated rotation this quarter, with multi-session workflows, hooks, scoped skills, and subagents all climbing as production frameworks like Fable 5 Agentic OS and Codex /goal loops took hold around Claude Code [1][4]. On the inference side, Xiaomi and TileRT's MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed pushed a trillion-parameter MoE past 1,000 tokens per second using selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime, marking those two tools as new breakouts [9]. RAG, knowledge graphs, and automated ingestion entered as new technique entrants behind self-improving knowledge base workflows that combine Obsidian, NotebookLM, and cron-driven indexing for persistent agent memory [6]. A separate thread of news covered the shutdown of Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models and the rise of open-source releases including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, and MiniMax M3 [8][11].
